race.description: Picklebet Get Your Pickle On (Bm55) Hcp
race.comment: AUSSIE ADAPTOR (3) joins the new stable today after racing in Victoria to begin his career. He comes through a very strong form race 54 days ago where 3 winners and 2 placegetters came out of from just 9 subsequent starters. Drawn well here back in trip and he can make a statement right away. SHAMOUTI (10) disappointed last start in a stronger race on the Gold Coast and is suited much better here. Back to this trip is a big tick and she's sure to make her presence felt. PURPLE ESPRIT (9) is not out of this on her recent form and looks well placed coming across the border from NSW. Can sit handy in the run and be in this for a long way. ZARIPPA (4) is next best after a nice trial recently.
